notes: Only the House Specials section contained dish names and descriptions; no prices were present anywhere in the raw text. Full menu sections (Soup Dumplings, Q-Bao, Dumplings, Wontons, Vegetables, Noodles, Desserts, Beverages, Alcohol) are listed in navigation but individual items and prices were not captured — only marketing descriptions for signature concepts were included.
